Class Payment

java.lang.Object
com.example.airlinereervationsystem.models.Payment
public class Payment extends Object
Represents a financial Payment transaction within the Airline Reservation System. This class tracks transaction identities, linked bookings, monetary amounts, execution timestamps, and payment modalities.

OOP Concepts Demonstrated:

  • Encapsulation: Employs strict private visibility modifiers for financial data security, exposing state alterations exclusively via public accessors.
  • Entity Association: Establishes a structural connection with the Reservation entity using reservationId as a relational reference.
Version:
2.0 (Sprint 2)
Author:
Donia Ahmed

  • Constructor Details

    • Payment

      public Payment(int paymentId, int reservationId, double amount, LocalDateTime paymentDate, String paymentMethod)
      Constructs a new Payment transaction record with audited financial metadata.
      Parameters:
      paymentId - the unique transaction reference identifier in the database
      reservationId - the target reservation ID this payment settles
      amount - the total monetary value processed
      paymentDate - the explicit date and time when the payment occurred
      paymentMethod - the platform or instrument used for payment routing

  • Method Details

    • getPaymentId

      public int getPaymentId()
      Gets the unique payment identifier.
      Returns:
      the integer payment ID

    • setPaymentId

      public void setPaymentId(int paymentId)
      Sets the unique payment identifier.
      Parameters:
      paymentId - the new payment ID to set

    • getReservationId

      public int getReservationId()
      Gets the associated reservation identifier.
      Returns:
      the reservation ID linked to this payment

    • setReservationId

      public void setReservationId(int reservationId)
      Sets the associated reservation identifier.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the new reservation ID to bind

    • getAmount

      public double getAmount()
      Gets the transaction amount.
      Returns:
      the double value of the amount paid

    • setAmount

      public void setAmount(double amount)
      Sets the transaction amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - the new monetary amount to set

    • getPaymentDate

      public LocalDateTime getPaymentDate()
      Gets the timestamp of when the payment was processed.
      Returns:
      the LocalDateTime payment timestamp

    • setPaymentDate

      public void setPaymentDate(LocalDateTime paymentDate)
      Sets the timestamp of when the payment was processed.
      Parameters:
      paymentDate - the new LocalDateTime timestamp to set

    • getPaymentMethod

      public String getPaymentMethod()
      Gets the payment method description.
      Returns:
      the string representing payment method

    • setPaymentMethod

      public void setPaymentMethod(String paymentMethod)
      Sets the payment method description.
      Parameters:
      paymentMethod - the new payment method string to set
